	TestSuite

BaseTestSuite.__call__c
7Run the tests without collecting errors in a TestResultN)
debugr,
BaseTestSuite.debugN)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__
__doc__r1
A test suite is a composite test consisting of a number of TestCases.
    For use, create an instance of TestSuite, then add test case instances.
    When all tests have been added, the suite can be passed to a test
    runner, such as TextTestRunner. It will run the individual test cases
    in the order in which they were added, aggregating the results. When
    subclassing, do not forget to call the base class constructor.
    Fc
_testRunEnteredT
_classSetupFailed
_moduleSetUpFailed)
_isnotsuite

tearDownClassrM
z TestSuite._tearDownPreviousClass)
    Placeholder for a TestCase inside a result. As far as a TestResult
    is concerned, this looks exactly like a unit test. Used to insert
    arbitrary errors into a test suite run.
    Nc
description)

z?A crude way to tell apart testcases and suites with duck-typingTF)
